name: ePaper SPI Display
description: The `epaper_spi` display platform provides a new ePaper display component architecture with improved state management and non-blocking operation. This component implements a queue-based state machine that eliminates blocking waits for the busy pin and provides better integration with ESPHome's async architecture.

config_entries.label: SPI ID
config_entries.description: Required to specify the ID of the [SPI Component](https://esphome.io/components/spi) if your configuration defines multiple SPI buses. If only a single SPI bus is configured, this is optional.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `60s`, use `never` to only manually update the screen via `component.update`.

config_entries.label: Model
config_entries.description: The model of the ePaper display. See the table above for options (case is not significant).

config_entries.label: Busy Pin
config_entries.description: The BUSY pin, if used. > [!NOTE] > Some displays use inverted busy pin polarity (LOW = busy, HIGH = idle). For these models, set `inverted: true` > on the busy pin. This applies to: `Waveshare-1.54in-G`, `Waveshare-7.5in-H`.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The CS pin. Predefined for integrated boards.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: DC Pin
config_entries.description: The DC pin. Predefined for integrated boards.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Dimensions
config_entries.description: Dimensions of the screen, specified either as *width* **x** *height* (e.g `320x240`  ) or with separate config keys. For integrated boards with full pre-defined configuration this is optional and will be preset by the model selected. The dimensions are specified in pixels, and the width and height must be greater than 0.

config_entries.label: Height
config_entries.description: Specifies height of display.

config_entries.label: Width
config_entries.description: Specifies width of display.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Reset Pin
config_entries.description: The RESET pin, if used. Make sure you pull this pin high (by connecting it to 3.3V with a resistor) if not connected to a GPIO pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: If the display should be cleared before each update. Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Full Update Every
config_entries.description: On screens that support partial updates, this sets the number of updates before a full update is forced. Defaults to `1` which will make every update a full update.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description: Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Reset Duration
config_entries.description: Duration for the display reset operation. Defaults to `200ms`.

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.

config_entries.label: Transform
config_entries.description: If `rotation` is not sufficient, use this to transform the display. Options are:

config_entries.label: Mirror X
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the x axis.

config_entries.label: Mirror Y
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the y axis.
